name: garmin-frisbee-analysis
description: Ultimate Frisbee performance analytics powered by Garmin data. Generates interactive HTML dashboards for post-game review, tournament fatigue tracking, and season-long trend analysis.
author: Evelyn & Claude

privacy.credentials: GARMIN_EMAIL and GARMIN_PASSWORD are read from environment variables at runtime. The password is never written to disk or logged.
privacy.token_storage: Session tokens are stored locally under ~/.clawdbot/garmin/ with permissions 700. Tokens are opaque bundles managed by the garth library; no plaintext credentials are stored.
privacy.network: All API requests go to connect.garmin.com only. HTML dashboards load Chart.js from cdn.jsdelivr.net (versions pinned). No credentials or user data are transmitted to third-party services.
